‘A Mass Disaster Nonstop’: Inside the Turmoil at Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s C.D.C.

I spent months reporting on the Trump administration’s transformation of the C.D.C under the leadership of Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. My sources say his actions are undermining America’s public health.
I interviewed 43 current and former C.D.C. employees. Many say Kennedy’s real goal is not to reform the agency but to dismantle the nation’s vaccination programs, in which it plays a key role.
The C.D.C. has fired and sidelined agency scientists and researchers as political appointees have taken charge. Some employees worry that the agency is being remade into a vehicle for ideologues.
The civil servants who spoke to me say that a century’s worth of expertise is being lost, leaving Americans exposed to a wide range of health threats with long-term consequences.
